flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Eastern University rose 19% between 2006 and 2009 ($20.0k → $23.8k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Eastern University fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (73.9% → 65.5%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Eastern University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Eastern University rose 44% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7k → 2.4k).
